reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 6 (Scope Check) triggered. While the spec violation is real (signature verification at line 129 executes after expensive getBlockSlotState at line 101, contrary to spec order), the attack requires sustained flooding with multiple malicious P2P packets to exhaust node resources. BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json explicitly excludes 'high-effort DoS: Sustained, CPU or bandwidth intensive, and/or requires more than 1 packet' from scope. Phase 03's attack scenario describes 'flooding' the network, confirming multi-packet requirement. Referenced 01e property from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json: 'After gossip validation acceptance, sidecar must have passed all REJECT checks in order.' Severity downgraded from CRITICAL to Informational as this is an out-of-scope performance optimization issue rather than an in-scope single-packet vulnerability.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: After gossip validation acceptance, sidecar must have passed all REJECT checks in order.
